generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, converting electrical current (I_M) into mechanical torque (τ_M) within the restricted working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum angular velocity |q̇_max| = 75°/s."
]

instance GearWheelTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission (gearwheel) component in the first vertical axis, reducing speed and increasing torque between the motor and cycloidal gearbox, contributing to rotational energy transformation."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100, providing high torque reduction and precision motion control with output torque τ_out."
]

instance Sinumerik840DController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl. CNC controller enabling separate axis control with configurable inputs/outputs for position, speed, and acceleration, interfacing with the digital twin via MQTT."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor input current (I_M) for torque/velocity derivation and friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary position encoder directly mounted on the permanent magnet synchronous motor, measuring high-precision angular position for backlash and elasticity analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox, measuring output angular position (r_out) for friction-induced deviation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) describing the structural architecture of the first vertical axis (Axis → Motor → Gearbox composition) and metadata for data trace sourcing."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram (IBD) defining flow definitions for rotational energy and electrical current within the axis components."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) providing semantic metadata for data trace sourcing (e.g., encoder channels, motor parameters) and semantic data linking."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance TorqueVelocityDerivationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model computing motor torque (τ_M) and velocity (ω_M) from measured input current (I_M) and motor constants using analytical equations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implemented in MATLAB Simulink simulating Coulomb-Viscous friction behavior for real-time friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implemented in MATLAB Simulink simulating Stribeck friction behavior, accounting for static, kinetic, and viscous components."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model (SimModel_M) simulating motor output (r_M) with friction compensation using derived torque/velocity inputs."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearWheelSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model (SimModel_GW) modeling torque/velocity transformations in the gearwheel transmission with friction effects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

instance CycloidalGearboxSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model (SimModel_GB) modeling torque/velocity transformations in the cycloidal gearbox with friction compensation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data representing measured motor input current (I_M) streamed via MQTT from the SINUMERIK 840D controller."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data representing measured motor angular position (r_M) from the primary encoder, used for backlash and elasticity analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data representing measured gearbox output position (r_out) from the secondary encoder, used for friction-induced deviation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance DerivedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed motor torque (τ_M) derived from measured current (I_M) and motor constants using the TorqueVelocityDerivationModel."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance DerivedMotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed motor velocity (ω_M) derived from measured position data (r_M) using the TorqueVelocityDerivationModel."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction-compensated motor output (δr_M) generated by the MotorSimulationModel using friction model inputs."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedMotorTorqueData, DerivedMotorVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearWheelOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction-compensated gearwheel output (δr_G) generated by the GearWheelSimulationModel."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedMotorTorqueData, DerivedMotorVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearboxOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction-compensated gearbox output (δr_out) generated by the CycloidalGearboxSimulationModel."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedGearWheelOutputData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelValidationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Comparison dataset between simulated friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck) and measured data to assess accuracy and validate friction behavior."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorPositionData, MeasuredGearboxPositionData, SimulatedMotorOutputData, SimulatedGearboxOutputData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelValidationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML toolset (Block Definition Diagrams and Internal Block Diagrams) enabling structural and behavioral modeling of the axis components and data trace sourcing."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance MathWorksSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink environment executing white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models for real-time simulation."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService, ModelValidationService
]

instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol enabling real-time sensor data streaming from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl. controller to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) framework providing semantic data linking and metadata management for traceability."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService, ModelValidationService
]

instance FrictionAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital shadow processing component integrating white-box and black-box friction models for real-time friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard enabler integrating processed data (simulated vs. measured torque/velocity) for operational monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance ModelValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model validation component comparing simulated friction models against measured data to assess accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelValidationService
]

instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Event-driven data ingestion service collecting operational events (axis movements, tool changes) for friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous, multi-physics-aware identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction in the gearbox using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeFrictionIdentificationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compensation of friction-induced inaccuracies (up to 30%) by refining control algorithms with friction model outputs for improved motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyDiagnosticsInsight, FrictionParameterUpdatesInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of processed data (simulated vs. measured torque/velocity) in a unified dashboard for operational monitoring and trend analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualAnalyticsInsight
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated friction models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck) against measured data to assess accuracy and validate model performance."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction coefficients for dynamic friction model updates."
]

instance MotionAccuracyDiagnosticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of deviations between simulated and measured torque/velocity to identify friction losses and motion inaccuracies."
]

instance FrictionParameterUpdatesInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time updates to friction parameters for control algorithm tuning and friction compensation."
]

instance VisualAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Trend analysis and comparative plots (measured vs. simulated outputs) for operational monitoring and decision-making."
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of simulated friction model accuracy through comparison with measured data, enabling continuous model refinement."
]

instance OperationalRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Suggestions for tool changes, lubrication adjustments, or maintenance based on friction trends and operational data analysis."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C12: Environment
instance MabiMax100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment containing the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, including mechanical and electrical subsystems."
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearWheelTransmission, CycloidalGearbox, Sinumerik840DController, MotorCurrentSensor, MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance DigitalShadowEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital shadow environment hosting all simulation models, data processing components, and visualization dashboards."
    base:contains SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram, SysMLInternalBlockDiagram, AssetAdministrationShell, TorqueVelocityDerivationModel, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, MotorSimulationModel, GearWheelSimulationModel, CycloidalGearboxSimulationModel, MeasuredMotorCurrentData, MeasuredMotorPositionData, MeasuredGearboxPositionData, DerivedMotorTorqueData, DerivedMotorVelocityData, SimulatedMotorOutputData, SimulatedGearWheelOutputData, SimulatedGearboxOutputData, FrictionModelValidationData
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates at **real-time and near-real-time scales**:
  - **Live data ingestion**: Sensor data (e.g., encoder readings, current) are streamed at **high-frequency intervals** (not explicitly quantified but implied by CNC control precision).
  - **Model computation**: Friction models (e.g., Simulink simulations) are executed **dynamically** during operation to match the PT’s operational tempo.
  - **Dashboard updates**: Visualization occurs **continuously** to reflect real-time friction analysis, with **latency minimized** via direct MQTT streaming.
  Synchronization between PT and DT is **asynchronous** (one-way data flow) but **time-aligned** via timestamped data traces."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is a **purpose-specific digital shadow** integrated into a **larger digital twin ecosystem** (implied but not detailed). Key components include:
  - **Physical Twin (PT)**: MABI MAX 100 first axis (motor, gearboxes, encoders, CNC controller).
  - **Digital Shadow (DS)**: Centralized, real-time data processing unit with:
    - **Data ingestion layer**: MQTT-based sensor data streams.
    - **Processing layer**: Simulation models (Simulink) for friction analysis.
    - **Visualization layer**: Dashboard for operator insights.
  - **Orchestration**: The DS **does not autonomously control the PT** but provides **feedback for control algorithm refinement**. The constellation follows a **one-way data flow** (PT → DS) with **no closed-loop interaction**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates primarily during the **operational phase** of the robot’s life cycle, focusing on **as-operated** (real-time) representation of the first axis. It does **not** cover:
  - **As-designed** (idealized) or **as-manufactured** phases, as the DS is **purpose-built for runtime friction analysis**.
  - **Maintenance or decommissioning** stages.
  The DS is **dynamic and evolves continuously** during operation to adapt to **wear, tool changes, or environmental factors** (e.g., temperature)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Validation**:
    - Comparison of **simulated friction models** (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous) against **measured data traces** (e.g., torque/velocity deviations).
    - **Uncertainty quantification**: Differences between measured (r_M, r_G, r_out) and simulated (ˆr_M, ˆr_G, ˆr_out) outputs indicate model fidelity.
  - **Verification Mechanisms**:
    - **Traceability**: Each data trace is linked to its **source (e.g., encoder channel)** and **processing model** (e.g., Simulink friction block).
    - **Parameter Sensitivity**: Friction models are validated across **operational ranges** (e.g., load, temperature) to assess robustness.
  - **Error Handling**:
    - **Backlash and elasticity** are mitigated via **dual encoder measurements** (motor + secondary encoder).
    - **Data aggregation** reduces noise in friction identification.
  The DS **does not include formal uncertainty propagation** but relies on **empirical validation** via dashboard comparisons."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and digital twin (DT) involves:
  - **Network Protocol**: **MQTT** (lightweight, publish-subscribe) for **real-time sensor data streaming** from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl. to the DS.
  - **Data Format**: Time-series data (e.g., I_M, encoder angles) transmitted as **floating-point arrays** with **timestamps** for synchronization.
  - **Latency**: Implicitly low due to **CNC control precision** (not explicitly quantified but assumed sub-second for operational relevance).
  - **Security**: No explicit mention of encryption or authentication; assumes **trusted industrial network** (e.g., factory LAN)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is hosted and deployed within a **software environment** comprising:
  - **MathWorks MATLAB Simulink** for simulation model execution.
  - **SysML tools** (e.g., IBM Rational Software Architect or equivalent) for structural modeling.
  - **Dashboard visualization**: Displaying data traces and friction analysis results (tools not specified beyond 'dashboard').
  The deployment does not specify hardware (e.g., industrial-grade PCs) or cloud/edge hosting, focusing solely on the **software pipeline** for data processing and visualization."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to the following standards:
  - **Modeling**:
    - **SysML** (OMG standard) for **structural and behavioral modeling** (BDDs, IBDs).
    - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** (Industry 4.0 standard) for **metadata and semantic data linking**.
  - **Simulation**:
    - **MathWorks MATLAB Simulink** (industry-standard for dynamic systems modeling).
  - **Data Exchange**:
    - **MQTT** (IETF standard) for **real-time sensor data streaming**.
  No mention of **ISO/IEC 42010** (system modeling) or **IEC 62264** (enterprise integration) is provided."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations are **implicit but not detailed**:
  - **Data Integrity**: MQTT ensures **reliable data transmission** but lacks explicit **authentication or encryption**.
  - **Operational Safety**: The DS **does not execute remote PT operations**; all actions are **monitoring-based** (no risk of human accidents).
  - **Industrial Context**: Assumes **trusted network environment** (e.g., factory LAN) with **no cybersecurity threats** mentioned.
  No **fail-safe mechanisms** or **emergency shutdown protocols** are described for the DS."
]
